message:
🌱 Fix all 60 pre-existing lint errors (#3032)

Fix all lint errors across the frontend codebase without changing
any logic or behavior. Error types fixed:

- no-case-declarations: wrap case blocks with lexical declarations in braces
- no-useless-catch: remove try/catch that just re-throws
- no-useless-escape: remove unnecessary backslash escapes in regex
- no-explicit-any: replace `any` with specific types or `unknown`
- no-empty: add comments to empty catch blocks
- no-unsafe-finally: replace early return in finally with conditional
- prefer-rest-params: use rest parameters instead of `arguments`
- @typescript-eslint/ban-ts-comment: replace @ts-ignore with @ts-expect-error
- react-hooks/rules-of-hooks: add eslint-disable for Playwright fixtures

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
